title: Nathanael #3482
definition:
Nathanael = "gift of God"

 1) an intimate disciple of Jesus Christ, he is commonly thought to be
    the same person as Bartholomew
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nathanael = "gift of God"

 1) an intimate disciple of Jesus Christ, he is commonly thought to be
    the same person as Bartholomew

    NASB:  Nathanael (prob. the same as Bartholomew, see 918):
